# Project Buildup History: Power User Curve Analysis

- Repository: `power-user-curve-analysis`
- Category: `data_science`
- Subtype: `analysis`
- Source: `project_buildup_2021_2025_daily_plan.csv`
## 2021-06-11 - Day 1: Question framing start

- Task summary: Started this one by sitting down and trying to understand what Power User Curve Analysis should actually become. I did not rush into code yet. The main thing here was to write down the analysis question and what decision Power User Curve Analysis should support so the project had a decent base. At this stage nothing was fully locked, so I kept a rough list of things that looked useful and ignored the rest for now. I kept bouncing between the notebook, small observations, and quick plots until the direction felt usable.
- Deliverable: By the end of the day I had analysis objective written down in a rough way, which was enough to stop guessing and move into the next step. There were still a couple of loose parts, but nothing serious enough to block the next step.
